narrative:
Hill 3-B (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,206 registered voters, with 56.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.6%, a modest Republican lean of 2.2 percentage points.
